issues.description: Condition 'TurnCount' with min:1 is incorrect. '[Once Per Turn]' is a frequency limiter, not a turn count gate. Should use 'Always' or remove condition entirely; frequency is enforced by game rules, not DSL condition.

Action type 'AttachDon' with count:1 is imprecise. Card text says 'give up to 1 rested DON!! card', implying the DON must already be rested. AttachDon typically attaches new DON. Should clarify this attaches existing rested DON, or use a different action/filter to specify rested status.
